A '''cantina''' was located in the Western Square of [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]].

[[Dhagon Ghent]] and his friends often went to the Iziz [[Cantina/Legends|Cantina]] prior to the [[Onderon Civil War]]. It had a [[Onderon swoop race track|swoop track]] running under the city. When [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sullio]] was shot after leaving the cantina, Ghent was wrongly accused of the crime and immediately arrested. When [[Meetra Surik]] and [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Canderous Ordo]], one of Ghent's friends, came to the cantina, they were able to prove Ghent's innocence with the help of a [[Beast Riders|Beast Rider]] named [[Panar]], a slicer named [[Kiph]], and [[Nikko]], one of Ghent's other friends.

While in the cantina, the Exile can give one of her [[starport visa]]s to a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] spy named [[Xaart]] or to captain [[Gormo]], though [[Sakarie]] also asked for a visa. Later, a Beast Rider named [[Bakkel]] attacked the Exile when she asked for one of her [[Hologram disc/Legends|holodiscs]], to give to Ghent. Later, with the help of Ghent, the Exile arranged a meeting with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kavar]], but during the meeting [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Tobin (Human)|Tobin]] tried to capture them. Kavar [[The Force/Legends|force]] stunned Tobin's men and fled to the [[Iziz Royal Palace]], while the Exile had to fight her way through the Western Square and the [[Merchant Quarter]], before reaching the [[Iziz Starport]], and the Exile fled back to [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Iziz Cantina first appeared in the computer and video game ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''. Though the cantina is not given an actual name, it is nonetheless [[canon]]ical.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
